goal: Establish and execute a Loop governance phase goal that improves quality, efficiency, self-correction, and boundary safety without replacing the implementation main process.

quality_targets.quality: Prevent false-ready, false-accepted, demo-as-runtime, and evidence substitution.
quality_targets.efficiency: Expose long sequence and template debt without blocking current compliant hard-window records.
quality_targets.self_correction: Convert recurring failures into validators, evidence, and next-round constraints.
quality_targets.boundary_safety: Keep governance work separate from implementation main-process work.
quality_targets.reproducibility: Make every governance conclusion locally re-runnable.

non_claims: This governance phase goal does not mean GFIS implementation is complete.
This evidence does not create source-of-record, runtime primary key, review queue, runtime intake, WAES review, verified artifact, accepted, or integrated status.
This evidence does not replace customer, owner, WAES, KDS, UAT, production, or finance confirmation.
next_governance_queue: Integrate phase-goal validation into governance docs validator.
Keep loop efficiency debt visible as review_required until reviewed or intentionally accepted as historical debt.
Create a governance dashboard for quality, efficiency, self-correction, and boundary-safety metrics.
